name: Volcengine Ark
description: Capability URLs only (no openai.base): chat/completions + images/generations. Seedream has no /images/edits — i2i uses generations + JSON `image`. Do not set base or Gateway would derive a dead edits URL. Coding/Agent Plan templates use separate paths—do not mix.

name: Volcengine Ark (Coding Plan)
description: Coding Plan–only endpoints (/api/coding…). Do not mix with the standard /api/v3 base URL or plan quota will not apply. See Volcengine official docs.

name: Volcengine Ark (Agent Plan)
description: Agent Plan–only endpoints (/api/plan…). Do not mix with the standard /api/v3 base URL or plan quota will not apply. See Volcengine official docs.

name: Alibaba Cloud Bailian (Coding Plan)
description: Coding Plan–only endpoints and plan keys (sk-sp-*), separate from pay-as-you-go compatible-mode. See Alibaba Cloud "Coding Plan tool integration" docs.

name: Qwen AI Platform (Token Plan)
description: Qwen AI Platform Token Plan (personal/team) OpenAI chat + Anthropic base; plan keys (sk-sp-*). Do not mix with pay-as-you-go dashscope.aliyuncs.com or Coding Plan coding.dashscope.aliyuncs.com. Image models use a separate Skill path—not this chat template. See platform.qianwenai.com Token Plan docs.

name: Tencent TokenHub (Hy Token Plan)
description: Hy Token Plan personal subscription endpoints (/plan/v3, /plan/anthropic). Shares the same API key (sk-tp-*) as the general Token Plan; usage is deducted from the Hy plan bundle by model ID (hy3, hy3-preview). Do not mix with pay-as-you-go tokenhub.tencentmaas.com/v1 or legacy api.hunyuan.cloud.tencent.com. See TokenHub "Token Plan personal edition" docs.

name: Zhipu GLM
description: China-region OpenAI-compatible root (/api/paas/v4): chat/completions + images/generations (GLM-Image / CogView). Coding Plan template stays chat-only.

name: Zhipu GLM (Coding Plan)
description: GLM Coding Plan OpenAI chat endpoint (LLM only); Anthropic base for tools such as Claude Code. Do not mix with the general /api/paas/v4 path.

name: Z.AI GLM (International)
description: Z.AI international OpenAI-compatible root (api.z.ai/api/paas/v4): chat/completions + images/generations (glm-image); pay-as-you-go API key. China-region users should use the Zhipu GLM template (open.bigmodel.cn) instead.

name: Z.AI GLM (Coding Plan)
description: GLM Coding Plan international chat endpoint (api.z.ai; LLM only); Anthropic base for tools such as Claude Code. Do not mix with the general /api/paas/v4 path or plan quota will not apply. See Z.AI developer docs.

name: Meituan LongCat
description: Dual OpenAI- and Anthropic-compatible endpoints; upstream model IDs such as LongCat-2.0. See longcat.chat platform docs.

name: Kimi Code (Coding API)
description: OpenAI-compatible chat endpoint for Kimi Code CLI / Coding plan (api.kimi.com; LLM only), separate from the standard moonshot.cn platform. See Kimi Code CLI docs (platform & models).

name: Anthropic
description: Root URL has no path suffix; the gateway appends `/v1/messages`. See Anthropic console docs.

name: Google Gemini (Generative Language API)
description: Developer API: native Gemini base includes `/v1beta/models` (`key=`); OpenAI-compatible root is `/v1beta/openai` (chat + images/generations, Bearer; prefer response_format=b64_json for images). See ai.google.dev/gemini-api/docs/openai.

name: Google Vertex AI (Express Mode · API Key)
description: Vertex Express: base includes the full prefix `/v1/publishers/google/models` (use `.../v1beta1/publishers/google/models` for v1beta1). API key via `key=`; no project/location/OAuth required. Express has no official OpenAI-compatible endpoint.

name: xAI (Grok)
description: OpenAI-compatible root (api.x.ai/v1): chat/completions + images/generations (Grok Imagine). See docs.x.ai.

name: Together AI
description: OpenAI-compatible root (api.together.xyz/v1): chat/completions + images/generations (e.g. FLUX). Host may also be api.together.ai—see Together docs.

name: Perplexity
description: OpenAI-compatible Chat Completions only (no Images API on this template). Path per Perplexity official docs.

name: Cohere (OpenAI Compatibility)
description: Uses the Cohere Compatibility API (OpenAI SDK migration path). See Cohere docs compatibility section.

name: NVIDIA NIM (integrate.api)
description: Common NIM OpenAI-compatible entry point; models and regions per NVIDIA Build / NGC docs.

name: Azure OpenAI (replace resource name)
description: Replace YOUR_RESOURCE_NAME with your Azure portal OpenAI resource name; deployment paths and `api-version` per Microsoft official docs.

name: StepFun
description: OpenAI-compatible chat endpoint (LLM only); other product lines such as Step Plan may use different URLs—see StepFun platform docs.

name: Xiaomi MiMo
description: OpenAI-compatible chat endpoint (LLM only); host and path per latest Xiaomi MiMo platform docs.

name: Xiaomi MiMo (Token Plan)
description: Xiaomi MiMo Token Plan OpenAI chat endpoint (LLM only); Anthropic base for tools such as Claude Code. Do not mix with the general API endpoint.

name: OpenRouter
description: OpenAI-compatible chat via /api/v1; Images use OpenRouter's dedicated POST /api/v1/images (not /images/generations). See openrouter.ai/docs image API.

name: Ollama (Local)
description: Default local Ollama OpenAI-compatible chat endpoint (LLM only). For remote or container deployments, change the host/port in the chat URL.
